positive: A stylized, symmetrical minimalist illustration featuring a whimsical forest landscape at twilight. The composition is centered, dominated by a single, large, stylized crescent moon hanging between two ancient, twisted trees. The trees have exaggerated, ornate roots and branches, forming a natural, protective archway. Include a scattering of bioluminescent flora at the base of the trees and a gentle, flowing river reflecting the moonlight. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, forest teal, metallic gold, and warm cream. The style should be reminiscent of elegant woodblock printing mixed with modern folk art, designed with crisp, clean lines and strong silhouette presence. Perfect for a central apparel graphic, isolated on a clean background.
negative: low detail, blurry, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifacts, grainy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, messy
